name: geoCapture API
description:
This interface provides different endpoints to integrate geoCapture into your software solutions, offering a variety of functionalities for time-tracking, gps tracking services, disposition, and many more.

Time tracking can be achieved through the generation of stamps using this API. These stamps can be used to record employees' working hours.

Authentication in the geoCapture API is handled by passing the "apitoken" as a query parameter. Developers must include the "apitoken" value in their API requests to authenticate and access the endpoints.

This documentation allows you to try out the different endpoints by entering an API key when you click on the lock icon or on the Authorize Button.

This interface is rate limited. You are able to do 100 requests per minute. Further requests are blocked when the rate limit is reached. You will receive a response with the status 429 "Too Many Requests". To ensure optimal performance and avoid hitting this limit, we advise minimizing the number of API requests. This approach not only helps in adhering to the rate limit but also enhances overall system efficiency and reliability. Strategies like batch processing, caching, and optimizing data queries can significantly reduce the number of necessary requests, providing a smoother and more cost-effective user experience.

Please note that the API does not support tracking data input into the system. Instead, it provides endpoints to manage and retrieve data related to tracking, such as GPS records. and beacon data, ensuring proper data security and management within the geoCapture system.

In case of questions or errors, please contact our support team at +49 5458 93666872 or info@geocaputure.de.
